author: y4rr
content: Decision: Option B (set-equality for shuffled, order-equality for sequential). Rust rand crate uses different PRNG than torch; this is documented in dataloader_shuffle_coverage already. The principled approach is 'same items, just permuted' for shuffled configs. Sample type: a simple { features: Vec<f32>(8), label: i32 } struct using VecDataset<Sample>. Multi-tensor binary format mirrors optimizer-trajectory-v1: [u32 num_tensors] + per-tensor [u32 ndim][u32*ndim shape][f32*prod]. Labels stored as a [N] f32 tensor for simplicity (round-trip via i32-as-f32).
